{{Infobox character
| name = Adessa
| parents = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Zakareth]]}}
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|daughter of King Zakareth}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Adessa is the [[Heiress]] of [[Damasca]] and a potential successor to her father's rule. Though she possesses a sharp political understanding, strategic intelligence, and significant charisma, she is described as lacking wisdom. Her attempts to exploit a moment of vulnerability resulted in her being branded a traitor for betraying the citizens of [[Damasca]]. Following this betrayal, she was sentenced to permanent exile in the [[Territory]] of [[Lirial]], where she is to be monitored by [[Overlord Belanine]]. Physically, she has been seen wearing the red and gold colors of her nation, though she carries herself with a soldier-like intensity. During a confrontation involving the [[Bleeding Wand]], she displayed erratic and manic behavior.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The daughter of [[King]] [[Zakareth]], Adessa is the older sister of [[Leah]]. She wields the [[Bleeding Wand]], an artifact belonging to Ragnarus, and has endured a period of exile. Known for her keen grasp of politics, she possesses a shrewd strategic mind that [[Talos]] compares to both [[Leah]] and [[Zakareth]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] is [[Leah]]'s older sister.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] carries the [[Bleeding Wand]], an artifact of Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] wields the [[Bleeding Wand]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] is the daughter of [[King]] [[Zakareth]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] has been exiled.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] compares [[Leah]] and [[Zakareth]] to [[Adessa]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adessa]] is described as having a shrewd strategic mind and a keen grasp of politics.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"You two. You're the same as Cynara and Adessa."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
